summary: Iteration 139: Tested new Vehicle Weight features - Photo View dialog, separate VW messaging config, and image serving endpoint. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Eye icon buttons in completed entries, Photo dialog with 1st/2nd Weight sections, Auto VW Messaging card with WhatsApp Group ID input, Load Groups button, Telegram Chat IDs add/remove, and Save button.
seed_data_creation: Created test entries during backend testing with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified working: 1) GET /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify-setting returns wa_group_id, wa_group_name, tg_chat_ids fields. 2) PUT /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify-setting saves wa_group_id, wa_group_name, tg_chat_ids. 3) GET /api/vehicle-weight/{entry_id}/photos returns base64 images for entry with all photo fields. 4) GET /api/vehicle-weight/image/{filename} serves raw JPEG image (200 status). 5) POST /api/vehicle-weight creates entry with first_wt_front_img saved to disk (filename format: {entry_id}_1st_front.jpg). 6) POST /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify processes entry without crash (returns 'WA: 0 sent, TG: 0 sent' when not configured). Frontend: VehicleWeight table has Eye icon (View Photos) button in Actions column. Clicking Eye icon opens Photo dialog showing entry details + 1st Weight (Gross) section with Front/Side View + 2nd Weight (Tare) section with Front/Side View. Settings > Messaging tab has Auto Vehicle Weight Messaging card at bottom with WhatsApp Group ID input, Load Groups button, Telegram Chat IDs add/remove functionality, and Save VW Group Config button.

features_tested.backend_auto_notify_setting_get_new_fiel: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify-setting returns wa_group_id, wa_group_name, tg_chat_ids
features_tested.backend_auto_notify_setting_put_wa_group: PASS - PUT saves wa_group_id and wa_group_name
features_tested.backend_image_endpoint_serve: PASS - Image served successfully with image/jpeg content type
features_tested.backend_photos_endpoint_base64: PASS - Returns base64 images for all 4 photo fields
features_tested.backend_create_entry_saves_image: PASS - POST /api/vehicle-weight saves first_wt_front_img to disk
features_tested.backend_complete_flow: PASS - Create with images -> second weight -> photos -> auto-notify flow works
features_tested.frontend_eye_icon_buttons: PASS - Found 4 Eye icon (View Photos) buttons in completed entries
features_tested.frontend_photo_dialog_opens: PASS - Photo View dialog opens on Eye button click
features_tested.frontend_photo_dialog_1st_weight: PASS - 1st Weight (Gross) section with Front/Side View found
features_tested.frontend_photo_dialog_2nd_weight: PASS - 2nd Weight (Tare) section with Front/Side View found
features_tested.frontend_auto_vw_messaging_card: PASS - Auto Vehicle Weight Messaging card found in Settings > Messaging
features_tested.frontend_wa_group_id_input: PASS - WhatsApp Group ID input found
